title: Q3 Product Planning
transcript: Priya Sharma: Welcome everyone. First item — the onboarding redesign. Kavya Reddy, can you own the new onboarding flow? Kavya Reddy: Yes, I'll have the design ready by next Monday. Priya Sharma: Great. Vikram Nair, please prepare the migration plan for the analytics service in 2 weeks. Vikram Nair: Understood, I'll also coordinate with the data team. Neha Gupta: I'll draft the customer comms for the pricing change and send them tomorrow. Priya Sharma: We decided to adopt the new design system across all web surfaces. We also decided to freeze new feature work one week before the Q3 release.
